name: Cooked Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dry ingredients thoroughly.
2. Beat eggs in the top of a double boiler and add dry ingredients gradually.
3. Slowly add vinegar and water, stirring to keep the mixture smooth.
4. Continue stirring until the dressing is thick and smooth, approximately 10 minutes.
5. Stir in the melted butter until well combined.
6. Allow the dressing to cool before storing it in the refrigerator for use on potato, vegetable, or mixed fruit salads.
Many of the recipes in this collection did not contain amounts or oven temperatures. I have typed them in as they appear in the book, typos and all.
